title: Sync connections to Google Drive
author: GothicSecret
body_snippet:
## Possible Solution
You can use public google API to access and store connections to the GoogleDrive account

iterations.description: Feature request to add Google Drive as a connection file sync/storage backend, requiring OAuth2 and Drive API integration

notes:
AI triage (claude): Feature request to add Google Drive as a connection file sync/storage backend, requiring OAuth2 and Drive API integration
Approach: Add a Google Drive sync provider using Google Drive API with OAuth2 authentication, integrating into the existing connection save/load infrastructure alongside the current local and SQL Server backends
